# CWE-360 safe: Trust of System Event Data (mitigated, pure stdlib)
lang: go
file: CWE-360-safe.pure.go
variant: pure-go
---
package sample

import (
	"database/sql"
	"net"
	"net/http"
	"strings"
)

func RecordVisitorAddress(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request, db *sql.DB) error {
	reason := r.FormValue("reason")
	if reason == "" {
		http.Error(w, "reason required", http.StatusBadRequest)
		return http.ErrMissingFile
	}
	host, _, err := net.SplitHostPort(r.RemoteAddr)
	if err != nil {
		http.Error(w, err.Error(), http.StatusBadRequest)
		return err
	}
	clientIP := strings.Trim(host, "[]")
	_, err = db.Exec("INSERT INTO visitor_blocks (ip, reason) VALUES (?, ?)", clientIP, reason)
	if err != nil {
		http.Error(w, err.Error(), http.StatusInternalServerError)
		return err
	}
	w.WriteHeader(http.StatusAccepted)
	return nil
}
